column64: The customer called to verify if a specific Welcome Tune code/song was available in our gallery. The CM repeatedly misinformed the customer that it is impossible to check for the song unless the service is actively running on the customer's own number. However, according to the Detail FAQ (Song searching without activating subscriptions), if a customer's number does not have the service active, agents are strictly instructed to use either of the two designated system numbers (1793056993 / 1318478358) to check the availability of the song/tune first. column64:
Information-Service Modality (CE-A): The customer wanted to update their registered SIM information from an old NID to a Smart NID. The CM (Case Manager / Agent) incorrectly advised the customer that they could complete this update directly through live chat. However, as per the standard service modality for Individual to Individual TOF / ID Swap (NID to SNID) for the same customer, this process cannot be done online and strictly requires:

1.Physical Presence of the customer at a service center.

2.A Valid NEW ID (Original) (Note: For NID/Smart ID verification, a photocopy or soft copy is allowed during the physical visit).
